glyphs.note: Per-file byte ceiling for any public/assets/glyphs/<pack>/*.svg, enforced fail-fast by tools/bake_glyphs.py. Derived from the data: the heaviest flag after SVGO optimization (ascension-island) is 62906 bytes; 73728 (72 KiB) leaves ~17% headroom. Catches UI-glyph bloat before it ships. Raise deliberately only if a richer glyph genuinely earns it.
